narrative:
Blue Ash 3-B (precinct in Hamilton County) has 783 registered voters, with 51.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 21.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 26.7%, a modest Democratic lean of 5.1 percentage points.
